backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend managing user profiles, science chapter notes, game states, and high scores with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three sound-effect features (useSoundEffects hook creation and integration into Section A and Section B game pages) to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and destructive variants.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, PWA manifest/icon links, and JSON-LD structured data for the Memory Increase brain training app.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for Memory Increase defining app name, icons, display mode, theme colors, and shortcuts to Card Matching and Progress pages.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for static assets and network-first strategy for HTML/scripts, with install-time pre-caching and old-cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines all application routes using TanStack Router, mapping URL paths to game and utility page components under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Renders a single flip card with a 3D CSS rotation animation, showing a card-back image when face-down and an emoji value when face-up.
frontend/src/components/CardGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive CSS grid of Card components for the card-matching game, delegating click handling and flip/match state to the parent.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Displays a summary tile for a single game on the home page, showing its icon, description, current level, and a Play button.
frontend/src/components/GameControls.tsx: Provides Restart and Home buttons used within game pages to reset the current game or navigate back to the main menu.
frontend/src/components/GameScore.tsx: Shows a modal dialog with time, moves, and calculated score when a game is completed, with Play Again and Menu actions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps all pages with a sticky header (logo, Progress link, login/logout), a main content outlet, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/NoteCard.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PatternGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of toggle cells for the pattern memory game, displaying the target pattern during memorization and accepting user input during the input phase.
frontend/src/components/SequenceItem.tsx: Renders a single button cell for the sequence memory game, with distinct styles for active (highlighted), selected, and disabled states.
frontend/src/components/SlidingTile.tsx: Renders one tile in the sliding puzzle, either as a styled numbered button or an empty placeholder for the blank space.
frontend/src/components/StroopDisplay.ts: Displays a color word rendered in a mismatched ink color and four color-selection buttons for the Stroop effect game.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCardGame.ts: Manages all state and logic for the card-matching game, including card generation, flip handling, match detection, and game completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useFillInTheBlanks.ts: Custom hook managing fill-in-the-blank game state, including random sentence selection, user input validation, score/streak tracking, and answer reveal logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameTimer.ts: Custom hook providing a stopwatch-style timer with start, stop, and reset controls using an interval-based elapsed time tracker.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemoryTest.ts: Custom hook managing a memory test game with memorize and recall phases, countdown timers, emoji object guessing, and win/loss detection based on difficulty config.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissingLetter.ts: Custom hook for a missing-letter word game that randomly removes letters from words, validates user input, and tracks score, streak, and difficulty level.
frontend/src/hooks/usePatternMemory.ts: Custom hook managing a grid-based pattern memory game with memorize and input phases, pattern generation, user cell toggling, and submission validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching player game state and high scores from a backend actor, plus a mutation hook for completing a game level.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreCalculation.t: Utility hook that calculates a final score based on time taken, number of moves, and level, applying time/move penalties and a level multiplier.
frontend/src/hooks/useSequenceMemory.ts: Custom hook managing a sequence memory game where a colored-emoji sequence is displayed then reproduced by the user, with attempt tracking and reset functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlidingPuzzle.ts: Custom hook managing sliding puzzle state including tile generation, solvability checking, tile click handling, and completion detection based on difficulty-configured grid size.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundEffects.ts: Custom hook providing Web Audio API-based sound effects (click, success, error) using oscillators and gain nodes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeedTyping.ts: Custom hook managing a 60-second speed typing game, tracking user input, WPM, accuracy, character statuses, and timer state.
frontend/src/hooks/useStroopEffect.ts: Custom hook managing the Stroop Effect game state, including color pair generation, round progression, scoring, and a countdown timer.
frontend/src/hooks/useWordScramble.ts: Custom hook managing word scramble game logic including random word selection, shuffling, user input validation, scoring, and streak tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file configuring Tailwind base/components/utilities and defining light/dark mode CSS custom properties for a brain-training purple/cyan theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CardMatchingGame.tsx: Card matching game page component that renders the game grid, tracks elapsed time, plays sound effects on match/mismatch, and submits level completion results via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/FillInTheBlanksGame.t: React page component for a 'Fill in the Blanks' game where users type missing words to complete sentences, with score/streak tracking and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that displays a grid of available brain-training games (card matching, sliding puzzle, word games, etc.) organized into sections, with navigation to each game.
frontend/src/pages/InstallGuide.tsx: Static informational page providing step-by-step instructions for installing the Memory Increase app as a PWA on Chrome (desktop and mobile).
frontend/src/pages/MemoryTestGame.tsx: React page for a memory test game where users memorize displayed objects then recall them by typing, with phase management (memorize/recall/won/lost) and blockchain score saving.
frontend/src/pages/MissingLetterGame.tsx: React page for a 'Missing Letter' word game where users fill in blanks within words, supporting easy/hard difficulty modes with score, streak tracking, and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/PatternMemoryGame.tsx: A pattern memory game page where users memorize and reproduce a grid pattern, with timer tracking, attempt counting, sound effects, and level completion reporting to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: A progress tracking page that displays the player's current level, score, time, unlocked puzzles, and high scores, requiring Internet Identity login to view data.
frontend/src/pages/SequenceMemoryGame.ts: A sequence memory game page where users watch and reproduce a displayed sequence, with timer, attempt tracking, sound effects, and backend level completion reporting.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: An empty settings page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/SlidingPuzzleGame.tsx: A sliding tile puzzle game page that tracks moves and elapsed time, plays sounds on tile clicks and completion, and reports level completion to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/SpeedTypingGame.tsx: A speed typing game page with a countdown timer that measures WPM and accuracy, plays success/error sounds on game over, and displays results with a restart option.
frontend/src/pages/StroopEffectGame.tsx: A Stroop effect game page where users identify text ink color against misleading color words, tracking score and correct answers over 30 rounds with a 30-second timer and backend reporting.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: An empty subjects page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/WordScrambleGame.tsx: React page component for the Word Scramble game that displays a scrambled word for the user to unscramble, handles input/submission with sound effects, and shows score and streak stats.
frontend/src/utils/difficultyConfig.ts: Defines and exports difficulty configuration presets (grid size, timing, counts) for six game types across five difficulty levels, with a helper function to retrieve the config for a given game and level.
frontend/src/utils/sentenceDatabase.ts: Exports a static array of fill-in-the-blank sentence entries with answers and categories (animals, fruits, daily use) used by the Fill in the Blanks game.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and clearing sensitive params from the URL without a page reload.
frontend/src/utils/wordDatabase.ts: Defines a categorized word database split into easy (3–5 letters) and hard (6+ letters) words across animals, fruits, and daily-use categories, with helper functions to retrieve random words.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, font family, accordion keyframe animations, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the 'Memory Increase' PWA's version, architectural notes, completed features (sound effects hook and integration across all games), and a pending feature request for adding sound effects app-wide.
